title: ilex corallina var. wangiana
intro: Ilex corallina var. wangiana, also known as the Chinese holly or Wang's holly, is a plant species that belongs to the holly family and is native to China. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which can help to reduce fever and alleviate symptoms of respiratory and gastrointestinal issues. The health benefits of Ilex corallina var. wangiana include its ability to boost the immune system, improve cardiovascular health, and provide antioxidant protection against free radicals. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made into teas, decoctions, or infusions, and can be used to treat various health conditions, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
